meaning: n.行为,事实,功绩,实行,契约vt.立契转让(旧产等)
examples: He is all talk and no deed.
My grandmother says a good deed is its own reward.
Smith changed his name by deed poll to Jervis-Smith.
Esfandiari's husband said her mother used the deed to her Tehran apartment to post bail.
Dutch Prime Minister Mark Rutte said the attack on Mr Wiels was a "cowardly deed".
